title: Stamp Duty (Exemption) (M/s. Engineers and Architects Prack Consult GMBH) Order, 2001
title_en: Stamp Duty (Exemption) (M/s. Engineers and Architects Prack Consult GMBH) Order, 2001

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Stamp Duty (Exemption) (M/s. Engineers and Architects Prack Consult GMBH) Order, 2001 and shall be deemed to have come into operation on the eighth day of December, 1998.

The whole of the total sum of Tshs. 186,727,750/= paid to M/s Engineers and Architects Prack Consult GMBH by the Government of the United Republic of Tanzania pursuant to Agreement in Settlement of Civi| Case No. 172 of 1997 is hereby exempted from stamp duty.
